org.docgene.api

Class DocGeneratorAPI

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.api.DocGeneratorAPI

  • public class DocGeneratorAPI
extends java.lang.Object
    The generator API, usable in another application.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      DocGeneratorAPI()
      Create the API and don't reset the configuration.
      DocGeneratorAPI(boolean reset)
      Create the API.

      • createHeader

        public XMLHeader createHeader()
        Create the wiki header. Note that if you call this method twice, the first created header will be returned.
        Returns:
        the wiki header

        Returns:

                                boolean hasTOC,
                                boolean keepCase)

        desc - the article description
        hasTOC - true if the article has a table of contents
        keepCase - true if the title of the article case is kept
        Returns:
        the article

      • includeArticle

        public XMLArticle includeArticle(XMLArticle parentArticle,
                                 java.net.URL url,
                                 boolean keepLevels)
                          throws DocGeneratorAPIException
        Include an article in another parent article.
        Parameters:
        parentArticle - the article in which to include the other article
        url - the article url
        keepLevels - true if the numebring of the included afrticle must be kept
        Returns:
        the article
        Throws:
        DocGeneratorAPIException - if the parsing thhrows exceptions

      • includeArticle

        public XMLArticle includeArticle(XMLArticle parentArticle,
                                 java.io.File file,
                                 boolean keepLevels)
                          throws DocGeneratorAPIException

        Parameters:
        parentArticle - the article in which to include the other article
        file - the article file
        keepLevels - true if the numebring of the included afrticle must be kept
        Returns:
        the article
        Throws:
        DocGeneratorAPIException - if the parsing thhrows exceptions

      • includeArticle

        public void includeArticle(XMLArticle parentArticle,
                           XMLArticle includedArticle,
                           boolean keepLevels)
        Import an article and add this article to the model.
        Parameters:
        parentArticle - the article in which to include the article
        includedArticle - the included article
        keepLevels - true if the numebring of the included afrticle must be kept

      • createArticle

        public XMLArticle createArticle(java.lang.String desc,
                                boolean hasTOC,
                                boolean keepCase,
                                java.lang.String... categories)
        Creates an article.
        Parameters:
        desc - the article description
        hasTOC - true if the article has a table of contents
        keepCase - true if the title of the article case is kept
        categories - the categories on which the article belong
        Returns:
        the article

      • createOpaqueArticle

        public OpaqueArticle createOpaqueArticle(java.lang.String desc)
        Creates an opaque article.
        Parameters:
        desc - the article description
        Returns:
        the article

      • createOpaqueArticle

        public OpaqueArticle createOpaqueArticle(java.lang.String desc,
                                         boolean keepCase)
        Creates an opaque article, belonging to one or several categories.
        Parameters:
        desc - the article description
        keepCase - true if the title of the article case is kept
        Returns:
        the article

      • createOpaqueArticle

        public OpaqueArticle createOpaqueArticle(java.lang.String desc,
                                         boolean keepCase,
                                         java.lang.String... categories)
        Creates an opaque article, belonging to one or several categories.
        Parameters:
        desc - the article description
        keepCase - true if the title of the article case is kept
        categories - the categories on which the article belong
        Returns:
        the article

      • addAlternateTitle

        public void addAlternateTitle(XMLArticle article,
                              java.lang.String text,
                              boolean keepCase,
                              boolean inDictionnary)
        Adds an alternate title to an article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        text - the alternate title text
        keepCase - true if the alternate title case is kept
        inDictionnary - true if the alternate title must be added in the dictionnary

      • setMeta

        public void setMeta(XMLArticle article,
                    java.lang.String meta)
        Set the meta of an article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        meta - the meta

      • addTitle

        public XMLTitle addTitle(XMLArticle article,
                         ParagraphElementParent parent,
                         java.lang.String title)
        Add a title for the article, at level 1.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        parent - the paragraph parent
        title - the title text
        Returns:
        the title

      • addTitle

        public XMLTitle addTitle(XMLArticle article,
                         java.lang.String title)
        Add a title for the article, at the default level (1).
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        title - the title text
        Returns:
        the title

      • addTitle

        public XMLTitle addTitle(XMLArticle article,
                         int level,
                         java.lang.String title)
        Add a title for the article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        level - the title level
        title - the title text
        Returns:
        the title

      • addTitle

        public XMLTitle addTitle(XMLArticle article,
                         ParagraphElementParent parent,
                         int level,
                         java.lang.String title,
                         boolean keepCase)
        Add a title for the article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        parent - the paragraph parent
        level - the title level
        title - the title text
        keepCase - true if the case should be kept
        Returns:
        the title

      • addTitle

        public XMLTitle addTitle(XMLArticle article,
                         int level,
                         java.lang.String title,
                         boolean keepCase)
        Add a title for the article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        level - the title level
        title - the title text
        keepCase - true if the case should be kept
        Returns:
        the title

      • addTitle

        public XMLTitle addTitle(XMLArticle article,
                         int level,
                         java.lang.String title,
                         boolean keepCase,
                         boolean isSearchable)
        Add a title for the article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        level - the title level
        title - the title text
        keepCase - true if the case should be kept
        isSearchable - true if the title is searchable
        Returns:
        the title

      • addTitle

        public XMLTitle addTitle(XMLArticle article,
                         ParagraphElementParent parent,
                         int level,
                         java.lang.String title,
                         boolean keepCase,
                         boolean isSearchable)
        Add a title for the article.
        Parameters:
        article - the article
        parent - the paragraph parent
        level - the title level
        title - the title text
        keepCase - true if the case should be kept
        isSearchable - true if the title is searchable
        Returns:
        the title

                       java.lang.String ref)

        article - the article
        ref - the see also reference

                       java.lang.String ref,
                       java.lang.String desc)

        ref - the see also reference
        desc - the seeAlso description

                       XMLArticle seeAlsoArticle)

                             java.lang.String... categories)

        categories - the categories

        Returns:

        parent - the parent
        Returns:
        the paragraph

        public ParagraphElementParent getOrCreateLastParagraphParent(XMLArticle article)

        Parameters:
        article - the article
        Returns:
        last paragraph parent

        Parameters:

        article - the article

        Parameters:

        article - the article

        text - the sentence text
        style - the sentence style
        Returns:
        the sentence

                         boolean br)
        Add an image.
        Parameters:
        element - the root element
        parent - the parent
        imageID - the image id
        br - true if the image must be added in a new line
        Returns:
        the image

        Parameters:
        element - the element

      • setOutputDirectory

        public boolean setOutputDirectory(java.net.URL outputDir)
        Set the output directory.
        Parameters:
        outputDir - the directory
        Returns:
        true if the provided file is a directory

      • setOutputDirectory

        public boolean setOutputDirectory(java.io.File outputDir)
        Set the output directory.
        Parameters:
        outputDir - the directory
        Returns:
        true if the provided file is a directory

      • getOutputDirectory

        public java.io.File getOutputDirectory()
        Return the output directory.
        Returns:
        the output directory

      • setSearch

        public void setSearch(short searchType)
        Set the search type.
        Parameters:
        searchType - the search type
        See Also:
        SearchOptions

      • setLocale

        public boolean setLocale(java.lang.String locale)
        Set the localization.
        Parameters:
        locale - the locale
        Returns:
        true if the locale exists
        See Also:
        Localization

      • setFullTextSearch

        public void setFullTextSearch(boolean isEnabled,
                              int compressionLevel)
        Configure the full text search.
        Parameters:
        isEnabled - true if the full text search is enabled
        compressionLevel - the compression level, from 0 to 2

      • setOutputType

        public boolean setOutputType(java.lang.String outputType)
        Set the output type of the wiki.
        Parameters:
        outputType - the output type
        Returns:
        true if the output type is valid and supported
        See Also:
        APIOutputTypes

      • writeContent

        public void writeContent()
                  throws DocGeneratorAPIException
        Write the wiki content.
        Throws:
        DocGeneratorAPIException

      • writeContent

        public void writeContent(boolean clean)
                  throws DocGeneratorAPIException
        Write the wiki content.
        Parameters:
        clean - true if the content of the output directory must be cleaned prior to the writing
        Throws:
        DocGeneratorAPIException

      • hasGenerationExceptions

        public boolean hasGenerationExceptions()
        Return true if the resolving triggered parsing or consistency exceptions.
        Returns:
        true if the resolving triggered parsing or consistency exceptions

      • getGenerationExceptions

        the parsing or consistency exceptions
